data.body: Close attempted this session: completion verifier FAILED with 6 unmet criteria — 5 OPERATIONAL (>=10 clean shadow passes, capped live heal, flag flip, live pass with flag ON, partial-failure rollback rehearsal), all requiring multi-hour live runs, + 1 CODE gap (missing decision_census proof test). The CODE gap is now fixed in Gerrit change 435 (test_decision_census.py). Did NOT --force-close (5 operational ACs genuinely unmet). a118 stays in_progress for the operational tail.
